landing.headline: Hire on evidence, not guesswork.
landing.subheadline: Caliber is a talent-intelligence platform: explainable shortlisting, adaptive AI screening, and an honest candidate agent — bias-safe and human-in-the-loop.
landing.feature1Body: Describe a role in plain language. Get a structured spec, a weighted rubric, and a ranked shortlist where every score traces back to evidence.
landing.feature2Body: An adaptive interviewer probes each competency and produces an evidence-tagged report card — no black box, no fabrication.
landing.feature3Body: It works while you sleep, applying only where your verified profile already qualifies you — never inventing a thing.

auth.passwordHint: Passwords must be at least 12 characters.
